title: AquaVision App Restyle — adopt Theria Finance's techniques with a distinct aqua identity
summary: A structured plan to rebuild the AquaVision product demo (prototype/src/app + prototype/src/enterprise) using the same stack, design-token architecture, component library, chart plumbing, layout patterns, and code techniques observed in theria-FinanceApp/theria-finance — but re-skinned to AquaVision's own aqua/aquaculture identity and, critically, preserving AquaVision's non-negotiable honesty rules.

source_reference.what_it_is: A mobile-first personal-finance PWA. Vite 6 + React 18 + TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui (Radix primitives), lucide-react icons, recharts, motion (framer-motion), feature-sliced architecture, React-Context state, self-hosted Inter, offline PWA.

identity_shift.principle: Borrow every TECHNIQUE and STRUCTURE; change the SENSE. Theria reads as a warm emerald finance app. AquaVision must read as a calm, instrument-grade aquaculture platform — 'data-dense but calm, an instrument, not a landing page' (brand-identity.json).
identity_shift.from: Emerald/green finance palette (--primary #10B981), hexagon signature element, income/expense semantics, warm rounded 0.75rem radius, light-default theme.
identity_shift.to: Aqua/ocean palette (from assets/color_scheme.png), droplet/A-triangle signature element (the logo mark), measured/interpolated/sample + status semantics, tighter 0.625rem radius, DARK-default theme (operators check before dawn).
identity_shift.hard_constraint: AquaVision's honesty system overrides any purely-cosmetic theria pattern. See preservation_constraints.

keep: hash-free or hash router (decide in phase 0)

adopt_from_theria.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 via @tailwindcss/vite, shadcn/ui token system with @theme inline mapping
adopt_from_theria.components: shadcn/ui (Radix primitives + class-variance-authority + clsx + tailwind-merge, the cn() helper)
adopt_from_theria.icons: lucide-react, wrapped in a dynamic IconComponent
adopt_from_theria.charts: recharts, wrapped in a ChartContainer + ChartConfig provider that themes series from CSS vars
adopt_from_theria.animation: motion (framer-motion) for AnimatePresence screen transitions and micro-interactions
adopt_from_theria.pwa: vite-plugin-pwa (offline-first precache incl. fonts) — optional, phase 8

language_decision.recommendation: Migrate to TypeScript to match theria and get the shadcn component types for free.
language_decision.alternative: Stay JSX and vendor shadcn components as .jsx (drop the type annotations). Faster but loses type safety. Recommend TS.

drop_or_repurpose: @fontsource/inter-tight and jetbrains-mono may stay for display/mono; theria uses Inter for everything — keep Inter as the single family, keep JetBrains Mono only for telemetry numbers

design_tokens.technique: Copy theria/theme.css verbatim in STRUCTURE: :root fallback tokens, .dark overrides, and an @theme inline block that maps every --token to a --color-* Tailwind utility. Then re-value the palette for AquaVision. Keep theria's responsive rem grid and radius-derivation technique.
design_tokens.responsive_rem_grid: --font-size: clamp(13px, calc(100vw * 16 / 402), 16px) — scale rem to a 402px phone frame (AquaVision's PhoneFrame is ~390–402px). Same technique as theria's 386px frame.
design_tokens.radius: --radius: 0.625rem (tighter than theria's 0.75rem — reads as an instrument). Keep the sm/md/lg/xl derivations.
design_tokens.default_theme: dark (AquaVision default). Provide a light theme too, but ship dark.

aqua_palette.note: Blues sampled from assets/color_scheme.png, mapped onto the shadcn token roles theria uses.

domain_semantic_tokens.note: Theria has --income/--expense. AquaVision replaces these with its own domain + honesty tokens, kept VERBATIM from brand-identity.json so the honesty system survives the restyle.

twin.--interpolated: fades with confidence — opacity-driven, not a token

design_tokens.splash_shell: Copy theria's decoupled always-dark splash tokens; re-tint the radial glow to aqua (rgba(68,167,210,0.18)) instead of emerald.

typography.technique: Copy theria's approach exactly: self-host Inter Variable via @fontsource-variable/inter in a fonts.css; set * { font-family } globally; put h1–h4/label/button/input defaults in @layer base so Tailwind utilities override them.
typography.family: 'Inter Variable' as the single UI family (matches theria). Keep 'JetBrains Mono Variable' ONLY for telemetry/coordinate numbers (tabular-nums), which is an AquaVision requirement not present in theria.
typography.scale: Use Tailwind's --text-* scale (theria drives h1=--text-2xl, h2=--text-xl, h3=--text-lg, h4=--text-base). Weight medium (500) for headings via --font-weight-medium.
typography.numerals: font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums on every telemetry/financial number (AquaVision rule; theria does not enforce this).

iconography.technique_from_theria: lucide-react everywhere, plus a dynamic <IconComponent name=... /> that resolves `Icons[name]` at runtime with a Circle fallback. Buttons auto-size svgs to size-4 via the cva base string.
iconography.apply: Port IconComponent verbatim. Replace AquaVision's current emoji/text glyphs (✓ ⚠ ⌀ ▲ ◇ 🔒 🐟 in StatusBadge/ProvenanceBadge/EmptyState/etc.) with lucide icons for a coherent icon language.

signature_element.theria: A CSS hexagon (index.css .hexagon) with gradient, inner highlight, box-shadow glow, hover scale, and an active pulse keyframe — used for nav/brand.
signature_element.aquavision_reinterpretation: A DROPLET or A-triangle (the AquaVision logo mark: triangle + fish-eye + wave). Recreate the SAME technique — clip-path shape, gradient fill (deep→ocean), inner white highlight, glow box-shadow, hover scale, active pulse keyframe re-tinted to aqua — as a .droplet / .av-mark class. Use it for the bottom-nav active indicator and the brand logo.
signature_element.keyframes: Re-tint theria's hexagon-pulse and add a subtle 'ripple' pulse (expanding ring) to echo water.

component_library.technique: Adopt the shadcn/ui pattern: each primitive is a small file in shared/components/ui/, built on a Radix primitive, styled with a cva() variant map + the cn() helper, exposing data-slot attributes. Copy theria's utils.ts (cn) verbatim.

rebuild_aquavision_primitives_on_top.note: AquaVision's honesty components must be rebuilt as Tailwind/shadcn-styled versions, NOT deleted. They are the product's identity.
rebuild_aquavision_primitives_on_top.StatusBadge: shadcn Badge variant set (cva) with 5 states; icon+label ALWAYS; no_data uses a dashed hollow outline. Colors from --status-* tokens.
rebuild_aquavision_primitives_on_top.ProvenanceBadge: Badge variant set for 6 provenance types; sample variant is loud.
rebuild_aquavision_primitives_on_top.SampleDataBanner: shadcn Alert (destructive tone) pinned to synthetic views.
rebuild_aquavision_primitives_on_top.AlertCard: shadcn Card with a left severity border; plain-sentence body; never a score.
rebuild_aquavision_primitives_on_top.StatTile: shadcn Card + tabular-nums value + StatusBadge + StalenessTag.
rebuild_aquavision_primitives_on_top.StalenessTag: small muted mono text with decay coloring.
rebuild_aquavision_primitives_on_top.PhoneFrame: keep, but restyle bezel with tokens; theria is natively mobile so consider dropping the frame for a true full-bleed mobile shell on small viewports (see layout).

charts.strategy: HYBRID. Adopt theria's recharts + ChartContainer/ChartConfig plumbing for the conventional charts, but KEEP AquaVision's custom SVG for the honesty-critical visuals recharts cannot express safely.

adopt_recharts_via_ChartContainer.technique: Port theria's chart.tsx (ChartContainer, ChartStyle, ChartTooltip, ChartTooltipContent, ChartLegend). Series colors come from a ChartConfig object that emits per-series CSS vars (--color-<key>) scoped by [data-chart=id], themed light/dark.
use_for: chart-do-diel-cycle (line -> recharts LineChart with ReferenceLine thresholds)
adopt_recharts_via_ChartContainer.config_mapping: Build a helper that converts an AquaVision chart_payload into a recharts data array + ChartConfig, mapping payload.series -> chart-1..5 tokens and annotations.hline -> <ReferenceLine>.

keep_custom_svg_for.reason: These encode honesty rules recharts does not do out of the box.
list: chart-do-depth-profile & enterprise Profile view — depth axis DOWNWARD, gaps-as-gaps, thermocline band
chart-market-sizing / three-phase-funnel / phase-revenue-mix — honest-empty funnels with required-input rows
chart-financial-projection — qualitative spend envelopes + KILL GATE styling
chart-manual-vs-omnidrone — radar (recharts RadarChart is acceptable; port if desired)
PondTwin TopDownMap / SliceView — 2.5D SVG with confidence-driven opacity + feTurbulence uncertainty; NOT a recharts use case
keep_custom_svg_for.restyle_action: Keep chartSvg.js logic, but swap hard-coded var(--av-*) chart series for the new --chart-1..5 tokens and the aqua status tokens so custom and recharts charts share one palette.

charts.preserve: Gaps rendered as gaps, depth axes downward, thresholds dashed+labelled, provenance badge on every chart, SAMPLE DATA on synthetic charts.

layout.technique_from_theria: Mobile-first app shell driven by a currentScreen state machine, wrapped in motion AnimatePresence for screen transitions; a bottom nav for primary destinations; a FloatingActionButton for the main create action; a slide-in Sidebar for secondary destinations; safe-area insets (pt-safe/pb-safe/pb-bottom-nav); an AppPageBackground layer.

apply_to_aquavision.shell: Replace the current DemoMode left-rail + PhoneFrame with a theria-style shell: on phone widths, render full-bleed with a bottom nav; on desktop, center in a device frame OR show the sidebar. Reuse AnimatePresence for screen changes.
apply_to_aquavision.primary_nav: Bottom nav reinterpreting the three tiers and their key screens. Active item uses the droplet signature indicator (the reinterpreted hexagon).
apply_to_aquavision.tier_switch: Keep Free/Premium/Enterprise as a segmented control in the header (already exists as TierSwitcher) — restyle with shadcn Tabs.
apply_to_aquavision.fab: A FloatingActionButton for the free tier's primary action ('Log a reading'); reuse theria's FAB open/close + quick-actions carousel technique.
apply_to_aquavision.enterprise: Keep the full-width dashboard sidebar (theria's Sidebar.tsx pattern) for the Phase 3 views.
apply_to_aquavision.safe_area: Adopt the pt-safe / pb-bottom-nav utilities so it feels installed on a phone.

layout.screen_pattern: Each screen is header + scrollable content of shadcn Cards, matching theria's screen composition (e.g. HomeScreen.tsx).

aquavision_mapping.src/app/screens (free/premium): -> src/features/<feature>/screens  (assistant, setup, water-log, feeding, disease-id, forum, learning, records, analytics, predictive-health, recommendations, marketplace, consultation)

feature_sliced_migration.note: This is a reorganization; it can be deferred (phase 7) so styling lands first.

state_and_architecture.state: Adopt theria's React-Context provider stack pattern (ThemeProvider, plus a light AquaVision set: ThemeContext for dark/light, TierContext already exists). Wrap App in providers as theria's App.tsx does.
code_conventions: cva() variant maps for any component with >1 visual variant
one component per file, helpers extracted (Guidelines.md)
Tailwind utilities over inline styles (the current prototype uses inline styles heavily — convert to Tailwind classes)

animation.technique: motion (framer-motion). AnimatePresence around the screen switcher; layout/scale micro-interactions on cards and the FAB; the droplet active-pulse via CSS keyframes.
animation.apply: Screen transitions on tier/screen change; subtle enter animation on StatTiles and AlertCards; ripple pulse on the active bottom-nav droplet.

pwa_offline.technique: vite-plugin-pwa with autoUpdate, precache **/*.{js,css,html,svg,png,woff2}, a web manifest (name, theme_color aqua #0B608F, background #052A40, maskable icons).
pwa_offline.apply: Optional phase 8. AquaVision already bundles data + fonts offline; adding the PWA manifest makes it installable on a phone at the venue.
pwa_offline.icons: Reuse theria's scripts/generate-icons.mjs (sharp) technique to emit pwa-192/512 + maskable from the AquaVision logo mark.

must_survive_the_restyle: SAMPLE DATA — NOT REAL badge on every synthetic-fed view
Provenance badges on all data figures (6 types)
Status never encoded by color alone — always icon + text label
No Data (grey/hollow) must never read as safe/green
Staleness/age always shown next to a status
Depth axes increase downward; never inverted
Gaps rendered as gaps; never interpolate across missing data
Alerts as plain sentences, never bare risk scores
PondTwin interpolated volume renders visibly less certain than measured points; simulated layer stays empty
Banned phrases never appear (elevator-pitches.json#/the_words_never_to_use): 'prevents fish kills', 'detects toxins', 'diagnoses', 'predicts', 'revolutionary', invented user/conversion counts
TRL 3 / zero-users honesty framing on the landing
preservation_constraints.rule: Where a theria cosmetic choice conflicts with any item above, the AquaVision honesty rule wins.

phased_implementation.name: Stack setup
steps: Decide TS vs JSX (recommend TS).
Add tailwindcss v4 + @tailwindcss/vite to vite.config; add react plugin already present.
Create src/shared/styles/{fonts.css,tailwind.css,theme.css,index.css} mirroring theria; import in main.
Add cn() util (shared/components/ui/utils.ts).
Verify Tailwind classes render and dark theme is default.

phased_implementation.name: Tokens & identity
steps: Author theme.css with the aqua palette (dark default + light), radius 0.625rem, responsive rem clamp, @theme inline mapping.
Add domain semantic tokens (status/provenance/twin) verbatim from brand-identity.json.
Recreate the droplet signature element (clip-path + gradient + glow + pulse) re-tinted aqua.

phased_implementation.name: shadcn primitives
steps: Port button, card, badge, tabs, dialog, sheet, drawer, select, switch, tooltip, scroll-area, separator, progress, skeleton, dropdown-menu, popover, sonner, chart from theria; re-theme via tokens.
Port IconComponent + adopt lucide-react.

phased_implementation.name: AquaVision primitives on shadcn
steps: Rebuild StatusBadge, ProvenanceBadge, SampleDataBanner, AlertCard, StatTile, StalenessTag, EmptyState, UpgradeTeaser as Tailwind/cva components using the new tokens + lucide icons.
Verify honesty rules preserved (icon+label, grey≠green, sample badge).

phased_implementation.name: Charts
steps: Port chart.tsx (ChartContainer/ChartConfig).
Write payload->recharts adapter; convert diel/global-production/species-mix/tech-readiness/history to recharts.
Re-token the retained custom SVG charts (depth-profile, funnels, waterfall, PondTwin) to --chart-*/status tokens.

phased_implementation.name: App shell & layout
steps: Build a theria-style App shell: currentScreen state + AnimatePresence + bottom nav + FAB + header TierSwitcher (Tabs).
Reinterpret the droplet as the active bottom-nav indicator.
Adopt safe-area utilities; full-bleed on phone widths, device frame/sidebar on desktop.

phased_implementation.name: Restyle every screen
steps: Convert Free, Premium, and Enterprise screens from inline styles to shadcn Cards + Tailwind utilities, keeping content and honesty intact.
Restyle PondTwin controls (TimeScrub, LayerToggles) with slider/switch primitives.

phased_implementation.name: Feature-sliced reorg (optional)
steps: Move screens into src/features/<feature>/screens, shared ui into src/shared/components/ui, data into src/core/data.
Update imports; add @ alias to src (theria uses @ -> ./src).

phased_implementation.name: PWA + polish (optional)
steps: Add vite-plugin-pwa manifest + icons (generate from logo mark).
Add motion micro-interactions and sonner toasts.
Contrast pass in light + dark; verify offline install.

new_or_replaced: src/shared/styles/theme.css — AquaVision tokens + @theme inline (the heart of the restyle)
src/shared/styles/index.css — imports + global font-family + scrollbars + safe-area utils + droplet keyframes
src/app/App.(tsx|jsx) — theria-style shell (replaces current DemoMode routing)
restyled_in_place: All prototype/src/app/screens/* and prototype/src/enterprise/* (inline styles -> Tailwind/shadcn)
removed: pitch mode — already removed in this pass
unchanged: prototype/src/data/* (canonical @data imports and fixtures keep working)

verification.build: npm run build must pass; bundle self-contained/offline.
verification.visual: Headless-Chrome render of key routes (home, water log, disease id, analytics, enterprise overview, pondtwin) — confirm content + no console errors, as done for the current prototype.
verification.identity: Side-by-side: AquaVision must read as aqua/instrument, NOT emerald/finance, while structurally mirroring theria (token system, cards, bottom nav, recharts, lucide, droplet signature).
verification.honesty_regression: Automated grep for banned phrases in authored copy; manual check that SAMPLE DATA badge, grey≠green No-Data, depth-down axis, and gaps-as-gaps all survive.

open_decisions_for_the_user: Keep the desktop PhoneFrame, or go full theria-style mobile-first full-bleed with a device frame only on wide screens.
Do the feature-sliced reorg (phase 7) now or defer.
Ship the PWA manifest (phase 8) for an installable venue demo.

Reconcile the two AquaVision palette sources (brand-identity.json tokens vs color_scheme.png) before locking theme.css — this plan uses the color_scheme.png hexes already chosen for the current prototype.
